film.title: Poison Ivy 2: Lily
film.overview: A young and naive college art student becomes obsessed with assuming the identity and personality of a departed coed who used to live in her room, and in so doing causes complications that result in two men, a student and her art professor, lusting after her.

dialogues.dialogue: To expose it all.  To see myself the way a lover would.  No shame, no fear.  Not a fear in the world.  Nothing hidden, no secrets.
A dark club.  Loud music.  A corner to ourselves.  Anonymous. Shameless.  No past. No future.  Valeria Andrews: What's Come Over Me  Tease.
Taunt.  Twist him around my little finger.  No shame. No fear.  Without a fear in the world.  - Looking good.
